children.name: ParseInput
children.purpose: Extract and validate action, repo, branch from input JSON
children.behavior: Parse the input JSON and return the action, repo, branch, and any additional parameters
guarantees: returns error if required fields missing

outputs.name: parsed_data
outputs.description: Parsed and validated fields: action, repo, branch, optional params

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid JSON with action, repo, branch, returns parsed_data with those fields
Given invalid JSON, returns error

children.name: RouteAction
children.purpose: Determine which build operation to perform based on action
children.behavior: Inspect the action field and return a decision string (trigger, status, list, cancel)
preconditions: parsed_data.action is one of trigger, status, list, cancel

outputs.name: decision
outputs.description: Action decision: trigger, status, list, cancel

acceptance_criteria.description: Given parsed_data with action='trigger', returns 'trigger'
Given parsed_data with action='status', returns 'status'
Given parsed_data with action='list', returns 'list'
Given parsed_data with action='cancel', returns 'cancel'
Given parsed_data with unknown action, returns error

children.name: CheckDuplicateBuild
children.purpose: Verify no existing build for the same repo+branch
children.behavior: Query builds data store for existing build with same repo and branch; return boolean

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Query existing builds to detect duplicates

children.signature: def CheckDuplicateBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> bool

global_vars.description: Read builds data store to check for existing builds with same repo+branch

data_operations.description: Query builds data store for existing builds with matching repo and branch

constraints.description: Must not modify builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch with existing build, returns True
Given repo and branch without existing build, returns False
Does not modify builds data store

children.name: CreateBuildRecord
children.purpose: Create a new build record in builds data store
children.behavior: Insert a new build entry with initial status, repo, branch, and generate build_id
postconditions: new build record exists in builds data store
children.signature: def CreateBuildRecord(repo: str, branch: str) -> str

global_vars.description: Write new build record to builds data store

data_operations.description: Insert new build record with repo, branch, initial status, and generated build_id

constraints.description: Must not read from builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch, creates new build record in builds data store
Returns unique build_id
New build record has initial status set

children.name: ExecuteBuildPipeline
children.purpose: Run the actual CI/CD pipeline for the build
children.behavior: Invoke external build process (e.g., run tests, compile) and update build status incrementally
postconditions: build status updated to success or failure

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Update build status incrementally during execution
Store build artifacts produced by pipeline

children.signature: def ExecuteBuildPipeline(build_id: str, repo: str, branch: str) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read and update build status incrementally during pipeline execution
Write build artifacts produced by pipeline

data_operations.description: Update build status (e.g., running, success, failure) and read existing status

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid build_id, executes the build pipeline
Updates build status to 'running' at start
Updates build status to 'success' or 'failure' at end
Stores build artifacts in artifacts data store

children.name: QueryBuildStatus
children.purpose: Retrieve current status of a specific build
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id in builds data store and return its status and logs
preconditions: build_id exists in builds data store

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Read build status and logs from data store

global_vars.description: Read build status and logs from builds data store

data_operations.description: Retrieve build record by build_id to get status and logs

constraints.description: Must not modify builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given existing build_id, returns status and logs
Given non-existent build_id, returns error
Does not modify builds data store

children.name: ListAllBuilds
children.purpose: Return a list of all builds with their details
children.behavior: Query builds data store for all records and return array of build summaries

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Read all build records from data store

global_vars.description: Read all build records from builds data store

data_operations.description: Retrieve all build records to return as list

constraints.description: Must not modify builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of all builds
Each build entry contains id, repo, branch, status
Does not modify builds data store

children.name: CancelBuildRecord
children.purpose: Mark a build as cancelled and stop execution if running
children.behavior: Update build status to cancelled in builds data store and signal termination of running pipeline
preconditions: build exists and is not already cancelled

outputs.name: cancel_result
outputs.description: Cancellation result with success flag and updated status

global_vars.description: Update build status to cancelled in builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given existing build_id, updates status to cancelled
Given already cancelled build, returns error
Given non-existent build_id, returns error
Signals running pipeline to stop

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Construct the final output JSON with success, build_id, status, logs
children.behavior: Aggregate results from the executed child into a standardized JSON response

call_inputs.name: action_result
call_inputs.description: Result from the executed child operation

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Standardized JSON response with success, build_id, status, logs

children.signature: def FormatResponse(action_result: dict, action: str) -> dict

acceptance_criteria.description: Given action_result from trigger, returns JSON with success, build_id, status
Given action_result from status, returns JSON with success, build_id, status, logs
Given action_result from list, returns JSON with success, builds list
Given action_result from cancel, returns JSON with success, build_id, status
Given error action_result, returns JSON with success=false and error message

governance_notes: All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces exactly. Resource fields (global_vars, data_operations, requested_capabilities) are derived solely from internal_leaf_accesses. Pure_function children (ParseInput, RouteAction, FormatResponse) have no data store accesses and thus empty resource fields. Atomic_operation children have synchronized global_vars and data_operations matching their internal_leaf_accesses. No children were added, deleted, renamed, or reordered.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All 9 child signatures are preserved exactly as provided in Stage 2. No parameters were added or removed from any signature.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: internal_leaf_accesses are the sole source for resource fields. Each atomic_operation child's global_vars and data_operations directly mirror its internal_leaf_accesses entries. Pure_function children have no internal_leaf_accesses and thus empty resource fields.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each atomic_operation child, global_vars and data_operations are fully synchronized. Each internal_leaf_accesses entry produces exactly one global_vars entry and one data_operations entry with matching resource, operation type, and description. No exceptions needed.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All data stores (builds, artifacts) referenced in internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations. builds appears in CheckDuplicateBuild (read), CreateBuildRecord (write), ExecuteBuildPipeline (read_write), QueryBuildStatus (read), ListAllBuilds (read), CancelBuildRecord (write). artifacts appears only in ExecuteBuildPipeline (write). No data store is referenced without corresponding resource fields.
